(1) These rules may be called the Envi}onment (Protection) Amendment Rules, 2012. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, in Schedule 1, for serial number 69 relating to ‘Flour Mills' and -entries relating thereto, the foliowing serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:- Sl. No. Industry Parameter Standards (1) (2) 3) 4) "89. Grain Processing, Emicci :Iour Mills, F;?dldy A. EmlsSlg:pSat:?ydards i rocessing, Pulse Making orgGrinding {tonne per hour) ponce.;rrljtragion Mills . iIn_mg/Nm 1103 160 Particulate matter Noretharn 3 100 Notes:- () All dust generating equipments or processes shall be provided with dust extraction arrangement. (i) The bag houses, etc, shall be cornected to chimneys/stacks of 12 metres height or at least 02 metres above the top most peint of the building or shed or plant in the industry. (i) The unit shall channelise shop floor/fugitive emissionsthrough a stack of 12 metres height or at least 02 metres above the top most point of the building or shed or plant in the industry. -- 3 of 4 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY {Part IF—Sec. 3] (1) {2) ) | 4) ' B.- Effluent Standards Limeting value for coni tion i img#, except for pH ’ Inland surface | Public Land for water sewer imigation [oH 5.5-9.0 5.5-9.0 5.5-9.0 Suspended 100 600 200 Solids Oil & Grease 10 20 10 BOD, 30 350 100 3 days at 27°C coD 250 - - C.-Stormwater Standard: (i) Stormwater for a unit (having plot size atleast 250 square meters) shall not be allowed to-mix with scrubber water, effluent and/or floor washings. (ii) Stormwater within the battery limits of a unit shall be channelized through separate drain/pipe passing through a HDPE lined pit having holding capacity of 10 minutes (hourly average) of rainfall.”. [E. No. Q-15017/33/2007-CPW] RAINELSH DUBE,Jt. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number S.0. 844 (E), 19" Novemnber, 1986 and subsequently amended vide notification numbers S.0. 433 (E), dated 18" April 1987; G.S.R. 512 (E), dated the 9™ July, 2009,G.S.R. 543 (E), dated the 22™ July, 2009; G.S.R. 595 (E), dated the 21* August, 2008; G.S.R. 794 (E), dated the 4" November, 2009; G.S.R. 826 {E), dated the 16™ November, 2008; G.S.R. 01 (E), dated the 1™ January, 2010; G.S.R, 61 (E), dated 5™ February, 2010; G.S.R. 485 (E), dated 9" June, 2010; G.S.R. 608 (E) ,dated 21%" July, 2010 : G.S.R. 739 (E), dated the 9" September, 2010 : and G.S.R. BOY(E), dated, 4™ October, 2010, G.S.R. 215 (E), dated, the 15" March, 2011; G.S.R. 221(E), dated, the 18" March, 2011; G.S.R. 354 (E), dated, the 2™ May , 2011; G.S.R. 424 (E), dated, the 1* June, 2011; and G.S.R. 446 (E), 13" June, 2011.
